name: remote-claude-shell-manager
description: Observe and control many Claude Code sessions across remote desktops from a local terminal UI

scripts.compile: bun build packages/worker/src/cli.ts --compile --outfile bin/rcsm-worker && bun build packages/tui/src/cli.tsx --compile --outfile bin/rcsm-tui && bun build packages/cli/src/cli.ts --compile --outfile bin/rcsm
